name: default pipeline
description: Mirror of today's pipeline (apps/engine/src/api/http.ts): on the queue drain, transcribe? -> distill -> the moments/index extras -> task-extract (P4A slice 4, gated act.tasks, default OFF); the follow-up-draft act rides session.ended, not the drain. Each step's when.flag gates that behavior; the executor coalesces the drain distill-family steps into one distiller call and runs drain acts (task-extract) best-effort after it.
